CUHK format: PDF via Blackboard; filename: STUDENTID_COURSECODE_ASS#.p
Large DataFrames (>1M rows): vectorized ops, avoid apply(), numba for
Feature branch: from main, PR, squash merge; never force-push main
API retry: exp backoff 1→2→4→8s, max 4 retries, jitter ±20%; 429→immed
LaTeX: use \input{} not \include{} (no page break); hyperref must be l
LaTeX 'undefined control sequence': missing package or typo; check log
Claude Code: give file+line, state what NOT to change, prefer Edit ove
Debug: reproduce→isolate→hypothesize→test ONE change→verify. Never cha
launchd: StartInterval=poll, StartCalendarInterval=cron; plist in ~/Li
jsonschema: draft7, $defs for reusable types, additionalProperties:fal
Bash: set -euo pipefail; quote all vars; [[ ]] not [ ]; trap EXIT for
HMS IC window: rolling 252d; shorter=noisy, longer=misses regime shift

Data: Wind (CN equities), Bloomberg (cross-asset FX), internal HDF5 ti
Risk controls: max pos 3%, sector cap 15%, turnover penalty 0.003/unit
Momentum: 12-1 month returns (skip last month) — Jegadeesh-Titman; raw
